# AI Tools

Personal collection of AI tools, prompts, configs, and workflows for use with Claude and other LLMs. No framework, no build step — pure markdown and config files.

## Purpose

- `configs/` — Reusable Claude behavioral guidelines and CLAUDE.md templates
- `prompts/` — System prompts and reusable prompt templates
- `tools/` — Shell scripts and CLI wrappers
- `notes/` — Research notes on skills, MCP servers, and tools
- `workflows/` — Multi-step AI workflow definitions

## Key Files

- [.agent/global-claude.md](.agent/global-claude.md) — Canonical Claude behavioral guidelines (Think Before Coding, Surgical Changes, Use Current Documentation, Goal-Driven Execution). Import into any project via `@~/.claude/global-claude.md`.
- [configs/claude-example.md](configs/claude-example.md) — Base CLAUDE.md template. Copy into any project and extend the Project-Specific section.
- [tools/setup-claude.sh](tools/setup-claude.sh) — One-time machine setup. Symlinks `global-claude.md` into `~/.claude/` so all projects stay in sync.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) — Short AI agent entrypoint (required reading, key rules, upstream source link).

## Using Claude Guidelines

To apply these guidelines to any project:

1. Run `bash tools/setup-claude.sh` once per machine
2. Add `@~/.claude/global-claude.md` to the top of the project's CLAUDE.md

Updates to `configs/global-claude.md` propagate to all projects automatically on next Claude session.

## Prompts

- [prompts/github-repo-lockdown.md](prompts/github-repo-lockdown.md) — Lock down a public GitHub repo (rulesets, CODEOWNERS, hooks, branch protection)
- [prompts/setup-dead-weight-audit.md](prompts/setup-dead-weight-audit.md) — Audit Claude setup files for dead-weight instructions

## Notes: Skills

- [notes/skills/impeccable.md](notes/skills/impeccable.md) — Production-grade frontend design
- [notes/skills/taste-skill.md](notes/skills/taste-skill.md) — Metric-based UI/UX engineering
- [notes/skills/update-config.md](notes/skills/update-config.md) — Configure Claude Code settings.json
- [notes/skills/github-secure-repo.md](notes/skills/github-secure-repo.md) — GitHub repo security hardening
- [notes/skills/semgrep.md](notes/skills/semgrep.md) — Semgrep static analysis for security

## Notes: MCP Servers

- [notes/mcp/context7.md](notes/mcp/context7.md) — Live library documentation
- [notes/mcp/github.md](notes/mcp/github.md) — GitHub API via MCP
- [notes/mcp/shadcn.md](notes/mcp/shadcn.md) — shadcn/ui component registry
- [notes/mcp/ide-diagnostics.md](notes/mcp/ide-diagnostics.md) — TypeScript/lint errors via language server

## Notes: Tools

- [notes/rtk-token-saving.md](notes/rtk-token-saving.md) — RTK CLI proxy, 60–90% token reduction on shell commands
- [notes/tools/gsd.md](notes/tools/gsd.md) — Spec-driven dev system with parallel subagent execution
- [notes/tools/playwright.md](notes/tools/playwright.md) — Browser automation and E2E testing
- [notes/tools/lighthouse.md](notes/tools/lighthouse.md) — Performance, accessibility, SEO auditing
- [notes/tools/gitleaks.md](notes/tools/gitleaks.md) — Secret scanning in git history
